description: Please use the individual OPF option setting API’s described in this section. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opto(sid, all, iary, rary, opfile, rcfile)
python_syntax: ierr = opto(sid, all, iary, rary, opfile, rcfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid bus subsystem id from 0 to 11. a bus subsystem must have been previously defined. (input).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input).

parameters.name: iary
parameters.description: An array of thirty six elements specifying 36 integers, which are defined as follows. (input).

parameters.name: rary
parameters.description: An array of nineteen elements specifying which are defined as follows. (input).

parameters.name: opfile
parameters.description: Name of the opf optimization log file that will be produced if iary(26) is set to 1. it is a good idea to specify the filename in quotes. (input).

parameters.name: rcfile
parameters.description: Name of the pti read change data file that will be produced if iary(28) is set to 1. it is a good idea to specify the filename in quotes. (not currently functional). (input).

iary.description: specifies the fuel cost objective.
do not employ minimize fuel cost objective.
employ the minimize fuel cost objective.
specifies the active power slack bus generation objective.
do not employ minimize active power slack bus generation objective.
employ the minimize active power slack bus generation objective.
specifies the reactive power slack generation objective.
do not employ the minimize reactive power slack generation objective.
employ the minimize reactive power slack generation objective.
specifies the active power loss objective.
do not employ the minimize active power loss objective.
employ the minimize active power loss objective.
specifies the reactive power loss objective.
do not employ the minimize reactive power loss objective.
employ the minimize reactive power loss objective.
specifies the adjustable branch reactance (series compensation) objective.
do not employ the minimize adjustable branch reactance objective.
employ the minimize adjustable branch reactance objective.
specifies the adjustable bus shunt (var compensation) objective.
do not employ the minimize adjustable bus shunt objective.
employ the minimize adjustable bus shunt objective.
specifies the adjustable bus load (load shedding/increase) objective.
do not employ the adjustable bus load objective.
employ the adjustable bus load objective.
specifies the interface flow objective.
do not employ the interface flow objective.
employ the interface flow objective.
specifies the reactive generation reserve objective.
do not employ the reactive generation reserve objective.
employ the reactive generation reserve objective.
specifies whether to apply the power flow mismatch tolerance to the dual variable problem.
apply tolerance to the mismatch equation only.
apply tolerance to the entire equation.
specifies whether to apply the clamp equation to nonoptimized generators.
do not clamp nonoptimized generators.
clamp nonoptimized generators.
specifies whether to apply the clamp equation to nonoptimized transformers. (Not currently functional).
do not clamp nonoptimized transformers.
clamp nonoptimized transformers.
specifies whether to constrain interface flows.
do not constrain interface flows.
constrain interface flows.
specifies whether to employ automatic scaling of the objective.
do not employ automatic scaling.
employ automatic scaling.
specifies whether to regulate area interchange.
do not regulate area interchange.
regulate area interchange.
specifies whether to fix transformer tap ratio settings.
do not fix transformer tap ratio settings.
fix transformer tap ratio settings.
specifies whether to fix transformer phase shift angles.
do not fix transformer phase shift angles.
fix transformer phase shift angles.
specifies whether to fix switched shunt settings.
do not fix switched shunt settings.
fix switched shunt settings.
specifies whether to treat all generators as nonoptimized.
do not treat all generators as nonoptimized.
treat all generators as nonoptimized.
specifies whether to employ the generator scheduled voltage.
do not employ generator scheduled voltage.
use generator scheduled voltage.
specifies whether to scale reactive generation limits on clamped constraint equations.
do not scale reactive generation limits.
scale reactive generation limits.
specifies whether to round transformer tap settings.
do not round transformer tap settings.
round transformer tap settings.
specifies whether to round switched shunt settings.
do not round switched shunt settings.
round switched shunt settings.
specifies whether to limit the step size taken during solution.
do not limit the step size.
limit the step size taken.
specifies whether to produce an optimization log file.
do not produce an optimization log file.
produce an optimization log file.
specifies whether to include a detailed listing of Lagrange multipliers in the optimization log file. IARY(26) must be set to 1 for this to take effect.
do not print details.
print Lagrange multipliers.
specifies whether to produce a PSSE raw data change file. (Not currently functional).
do not produce an Read/Change File.
produce an Read/Change File.
specifies whether to save the OPF solution option settings to the OPF Options File, PSSOPF.OPT.
do not save settings.
save settings to PSSOPF.OPT.
indicates whether the program should open voltage limits to ensure an initial feasible condition.
do not have the program open the limits for an initial feasible condition.
have the program open the limits for an initial feasible condition.
specifies whether to impose emergency bus voltage limits or normal bus voltage limits.
impose normal voltage limits.
impose emergency bus voltage limits.
specifies whether to impose emergency branch flow limits or normal branch flow limits.
impose normal branch flow limits.
impose emergency branch flow limits.
specifies whether to include transformer adjustment data in the Read/Change File (if one is produced according to the setting of IARY(28)). (Not currently functional).
do not include transformer adjustment data.
include transformer adjustment data.
specifies the maximum iteration limit (corresponds to ITMXN of the power flow solution parameters).
specifies the bad iteration coarse limit.
specifies the bad iteration fine limit.

rary.description: specifies the initial barrier function coefficient.
specifies the final barrier function coefficient.
specifies the step length blow-up tolerance.
specifies the final clamp equation tolerance value.
specifies the initial clamp equation tolerance value.
specifies the clamp equation decay factor.
specifies the cost coefficient for the active power loss objective.
specifies the cost coefficient for the reactive power loss objective.
specifies the penalty value for power flow controls.
specifies the cost coefficient for the interface flow objective.
specifies the cost coefficient for the reactive generation reserve objective.
specifies the penalty value for fixed voltage.
specifies the lambda (Lagrange multiplier) blow-up tolerance.
specifies the minimum amount to open up tap settings by.
specifies the maximum amount to open up tap settings by.
specifies the amount to shift the interior point by during solution.
specifies the step length taken for the barrier method.

specifies the tolerance value used to determine which bus shunts get added to the Read/Change File as switched shunts (if an RDCH file is produced according to IARY(28) and the minimize added vars objective is employed according to IARY(7)). (Not currently functional).
specifies the solution convergence tolerance, in MVA (corresponds to TOLN of the power flow solution parameters).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
